     The Numbers Business Report

Love Again (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $6,230,837Details
International Box Office $4,495,195
Worldwide Box Office $10,726,032
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $433,120
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $550,138
Total $983,258
Further financial details...

Synopsis

What if a random text message led to the love of your life? Dealing with the loss of her fiancé, Mira Ray sends a series of romantic texts to his old cell phone number… not realizing the number was reassigned to Rob Burns’ new work phone. A journalist, Rob is captivated by the honesty in the beautifully confessional texts. When he’s assigned to write a profile of megastar Celine Dion, he enlists her help in figuring out how to meet Mira in person… and win her heart.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$2,380,962 (38.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.62 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:58.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,703 opening theaters/2,703 max. theaters, 2.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $6,811,770

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 5th, 2023 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: May 5th, 2023 (Wide) (Finland)
May 10th, 2023 (Limited) (Germany)
May 11th, 2023 (Wide) (France)
May 11th, 2023 (Wide) (Italy)
May 11th, 2023 (Wide), released as O Amor Mandou Mensagem (Brazil)
Video Release: May 23rd, 2023 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some sexual material and some strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2778 (cert #53042), 4/12/2023)
Running Time: 104 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Fictionalized Version of Yourself, Foreign-Language Remake, Remake
Filming location (country): United Kingdom
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Thunder Road Film, Screen Gems, 2.0 Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

What if a random text message led to the love of your life? Dealing with the loss of her fiancé, Mira Ray sends a series of romantic texts to his old cell phone number… not realizing the number was reassigned to Rob Burns’ new work phone. A journalist, Rob is captivated by the honesty in the beautifully confessional texts. When he’s assigned to write a profile of megastar Celine Dion, he enlists her help in figuring out how to meet Mira in person… and win her heart.
